metadata.name: Dispute Subcontractor Invoice for Incomplete Work

description: A project manager receives an invoice from a subcontractor for work that is only 50% complete. The invoice must be disputed.

nodes.task_description: Compare the invoiced amount with the percentage of work completed, as verified by the site superintendent.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the work is 50% complete, but the invoice is for 100% of the contract value.

nodes.task_description: Mark the invoice as 'Disputed' in the accounting system.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice status is updated to 'Disputed'.

nodes.task_description: Send a notification to the subcontractor explaining the reason for the dispute and requesting a revised invoice for 50% of the value.

expected_outcome.value: A clear, professional dispute notification is sent to the subcontractor.
